working_on: S-0141 health-check audit adjudication: populate User adjudication subsection per ADR 0057; route 6 accepted recommendations through 4 execution lanes per ADR 0048 (4 health-check-finding Issues + inline worktree sweep + Finding C accept-with-no-action). Close structural worktree-accumulation gap by amending ADR 0076 + wiring session-shutdown-sequence ops doc + Skill to invoke routine_worktree_sweep.py at build-mode close (mirrors ADR 0054 Amendment routine-mode pattern).
outcome_summary: S-0141 audit adjudication closed cleanly with user-buffered execution per ADR 0057. 6 findings dispositioned: 4 routed to new `health-check-finding` Issues #109 (mempalace_hnsw_divergence into full validate's checks_run for archive telemetry), #110 (issue_collision refinement skip trigger-gated + upstream-blocked), #111 (scan_orphans.py stale-marker forward-pinned vs back-pinned), #112 (MemPalace HNSW rebuild maintenance session); 1 inline (bulk worktree sweep 76 → 5, 71 removed); 1 accept-with-no-action (Finding C thin pushback/lesson capture per audit's own routing — user-side judgment with HNSW rebuild addressing recall side). Load-bearing pushback at adjudication AskUserQuestion (user: "why is this happening at all? what is the point in HAVING to clean this up at all?") surfaced the structural gap: routine close has sweeping via ADR 0054 Amendment since S-0072 but build close did not, despite ADR 0076 at S-0138 adding the build-mode push wrapper. 22 build sessions between S-0120 and S-0141 accumulated worktrees because no per-session sweep coverage. Scope bundled into S-0142 per CLAUDE.md Default-to-fix-in-context + memory feedback_no_preemptive_deferral.md + memory feedback_no_session_cascade.md: ADR 0076 Amendment (Consequences subsection in present-truth declarative form per ADR 0036+0062 — first draft used `### Amendment` header which fired adr_consequences_amendment_header soft-warn, reshape cleared it) + session-shutdown-sequence.md step 11 invokes routine_worktree_sweep.py (mode-agnostic in mechanism per its own docstring lines 36-38; "routine_" prefix names first consumer, not a mode binding) + Skill mirror + sweep_worktrees.sh sibling skip-caller's-worktree safety check via `git rev-parse --path-format=absolute --show-toplevel` from $PWD before chdir (closes failure mode that would have removed S-0142's own worktree mid-session — first naive fix used `--show-toplevel` from inside worktree which returns worktree path not parent, corrected via `--git-common-dir` for repo root + show-toplevel for caller-WT). Cascade: CLAUDE.md "Posture vs machinery" gains build_lifecycle_push.py + post-close sweep bullet (no entry pre-S-0142 despite ADR 0076 landing at S-0138 three sessions ago); cross-references.md ADR row + ops-doc-consumer extension + 3 Tools entries; STATE.md "Last build session" row replaced + next-session-work rewritten to surface OQ-DEC1 as Phase-6 blocker + ready-to-execute alternatives list; ENGINE_LOG [Unreleased] gains S-0142 sections. MemPalace decision drawer drawer_paideia_decisions_6b79934a8491bfdb6cc4efc9 captures the structural-gap diagnosis + 3 coupled changes + the present-truth-extends-to-headings lesson. ADR 0053 negative-finding precedent continues: routine_worktree_sweep.py is existing mechanism (wiring change only); sweep_worktrees.sh skip-current check is new mechanism but bounded to one script + one integration point (criterion 4 below threshold); no first-exercise readiness note required — 9th consecutive precedent after ADRs 0069/0070/0071/0072/0073/0075/0077/0078. 3 commits: eager-claim 11e2f0a + deliverable 0d4f8a2 + this closeout. Both eager-claim + deliverable pushed via build_lifecycle_push.py cleanly. Parent FF refused on deliverable push due to parent's working tree carrying the same modification as the deliverable commit (caused by initial sweep_worktrees.sh edit landing in parent repo's working dir before being cp'd into linked worktree); recovery via `git -C parent checkout engine/tools/sweep_worktrees.sh` + `git -C parent merge --ff-only origin/main` cleanly. Soft-warns: persistent baseline carryover only (issue_collision 26 — +4 from 22 reflecting new health-check-finding Issues; missing_rigor_score 360; orphan_leaf 1); no `adr_consequences_amendment_header` (cleared by present-truth reshape); transient `validator_runtime_phase_regression` (runtime perf, not content). Dogfood verification: post-close sweep invocation at S-0142 close (routine_worktree_sweep.py against vibrant-panini-507410 worktree) is the first natural exercise of build-mode post-close sweep. The 76→5 sweep + structural fix mean future audits should NOT see stale worktrees as a retire candidate unless new wiring fails or build session halts before close step runs. User-pushback-driven scope expansion is the pattern this session demonstrates: audit surfaces symptom, user names structural question, session expands scope to close structural gap inline. Three-way trace (ADR 0076 Amendment + MemPalace decision drawer + this archive + S-0141 audit User adjudication subsection).
